name: Oringinal"philly" Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and melted margarine; press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
4. Add the egg yolks one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
6. Pour the batter over the crust in the springform pan.
7. Bake at 300 degrees F., for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, and let cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly. Top with cherry pie filling or fresh fruit, if desired.
